summary: The diff implements a Phase 1 foundation with blob storage integration, authorization system, and basic collections. However, it is missing most of the required stable storage architecture, relational vehicle data layers, cascade delete, lifecycle hooks, and media management system specified in the BuildRequest.

missing_requirements.requirement: Stable canister storage architecture with persistent blob storage that survives refresh, rebuild, redeploy, and upgrade operations
missing_requirements.reason: Backend uses in-memory Map structures (userProfiles, websiteSettingsMap, vehiclesMap) without stable storage binding. No stable memory declarations visible.

missing_requirements.requirement: Deterministic blob storage binding with public HTTPS gateway resolver using URL pattern /media/{collection}/{assetId}/{fileName}, including file hash fingerprint and URL integrity validation
missing_requirements.reason: No media URL resolver, file hash fingerprinting, or URL integrity validation implemented in the diff.

missing_requirements.requirement: Create stable canister database with all 16 collections (passengerVehicles, commercialVehicles, promotions, testimonials, blogPosts, contacts, creditSimulations, visitorStats, mediaAssets, adminUsers, websiteSettings, productLikes, productShares, articleLikes, articleShares, articleComments)
missing_requirements.reason: Only 7 collections exist (websiteSettings, vehicles, creditSimulations, productLikes, articleComments, contactSubmissions, userProfiles). Missing: passengerVehicles, commercialVehicles, promotions, testimonials, blogPosts, mediaAssets, adminUsers, productShares, articleLikes, articleShares.

missing_requirements.requirement: Implement visitorStats collection with all required fields including auto-update mechanism for lastUpdated timestamp and optional advanced tracking fields
missing_requirements.reason: visitorStats type exists but lacks required fields: yesterdayVisitors, yearlyVisitors, onlineVisitors, lastUpdated timestamp, and optional advanced tracking fields (uniqueIPs, referrerSources, deviceStats, browserStats, locationStats).

missing_requirements.requirement: Implement websiteSettings collection with all fields including media asset references and auto-update timestamp mechanism
missing_requirements.reason: websiteSettings type missing required fields: mainBannerImageId, ctaBannerImageId, dealerLogoId, lastUpdated timestamp. No auto-update mechanism visible.

missing_requirements.requirement: Create passenger vehicle relational data layer with 7 collections: passengerVehicles, passengerVehicleVariants, passengerVehicleColors, passengerVehicleVariantColorMapping, passengerVehicleImages, passengerVehicleSpecifications, passengerVehicleFeatures
missing_requirements.reason: No passenger vehicle relational structure exists. Only a generic Vehicle type with no variant, color, or specification collections.

missing_requirements.requirement: Create commercial vehicle relational data layer with 7 collections including category system and variant mapping (no color system)
missing_requirements.reason: No commercial vehicle collections exist (commercialVehicles, commercialVehicleCategories, commercialVehicleVariants, commercialVehicleVariantMapping, commercialVehicleVariantImages, commercialVehicleSpecifications, commercialVehicleFeatures).

missing_requirements.requirement: Implement nested CMS data hierarchy for passenger vehicles with cascade delete and relational integrity
missing_requirements.reason: No cascade delete triggers or relational integrity constraints visible. No orphan record prevention logic implemented.

missing_requirements.requirement: Implement nested CMS data hierarchy for commercial vehicles with cascade delete and relational integrity
missing_requirements.reason: No commercial vehicle hierarchy exists. No cascade delete or relational integrity implementation.

missing_requirements.requirement: Implement stable memory mapping binding for collections, variant mappings, media binding, and counters
missing_requirements.reason: Collections use in-memory Map with no stable memory binding. Counters are regular variables, not stable write-locked.

missing_requirements.requirement: Implement admin authentication foundation system with seeded super admin account (email: blankster2024@gmail.com, password: dewi4more)
missing_requirements.reason: Authorization system exists but no super admin account seeding with specified credentials. No password hashing or session persistence visible for admin accounts.

missing_requirements.requirement: Implement canister lifecycle hooks pre_upgrade() and post_upgrade() with snapshot and restore functionality for all data structures using stable binary mapping serialization
missing_requirements.reason: No pre_upgrade() or post_upgrade() hooks visible in the diff. No serialization or restoration logic implemented.

missing_requirements.requirement: Implement media library backend manager with blob-only operations: Upload, Replace, Delete, and Index binding
missing_requirements.reason: No media upload, replace, delete, or index binding functions visible. MixinStorage imported but operations not implemented.

missing_requirements.requirement: Implement deployment safety lock to prevent modification of storage binding, DB mapping, vehicle relations, media index, and auth system
missing_requirements.reason: No deployment safety lock mechanism visible in the diff.

hallucinated_features.description: User profile management system with getCallerUserProfile, getUserProfile, and saveCallerUserProfile functions
hallucinated_features.reason: BuildRequest explicitly excludes user-facing authentication UI and public website components. User profile system not requested.

hallucinated_features.description: Generic Vehicle type instead of separate passengerVehicles and commercialVehicles collections
hallucinated_features.reason: BuildRequest requires distinct relational data layers for passenger and commercial vehicles with different schemas. Generic Vehicle type does not match specification.
